summary: Comprehensive testing of RX Expresss Gig workflow and Order Management enhancements. All features working correctly: Order Management filters (date, pharmacy, status), status icons with colors, action icons (view, edit, map), Gigs page with pending orders table, Auto-Create Gigs based on service zones, Create Gig modal, Assign Driver to Gig with status sync, Split Gig functionality, and Optimize route with Circuit API.
seed_data_creation: Created Gig 8 (Test Manhattan Morning) with orders 1, 2. Assigned driver 1 to gig. Split order 2 to new gig 9.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Gig workflow and Order Management enhancements are working. Status sync verified - when driver assigned via Gig, orders show 'assigned' status in Order Management. Circuit API integration is configured and working (marked as 'optimized'). Auto-create creates gigs for all 5 service zones (Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, Bronx, Staten Island).

features_tested.Order Management - Filters: PASS - Date, Pharmacy, Status filters all working. Filter by status shows correct filtered results.
features_tested.Order Management - Status Icons: PASS - All statuses have colored icons (New=blue, Assigned=purple, Delivered=green, etc.)
features_tested.Order Management - Action Icons: PASS - View (eye icon), Edit (pencil icon), Map (location icon) all clickable and functional
features_tested.Order Management - View Detail Modal: PASS - Shows order details with QR code, status icon, address, 'Open in Google Maps' button
features_tested.Order Management - Edit Modal: PASS - Status dropdown and Driver dropdown working
features_tested.Routes/Gigs - Page Load: PASS - Pending orders table and Active Gigs section loading correctly
features_tested.Routes/Gigs - Auto-Create Gigs: PASS - Creates gigs for all service zones. Tested with date 2026-02-19, created 5 gigs.
features_tested.Routes/Gigs - Create Gig Modal: PASS - Title, Date, Service Zone, Drivers fields all present and working
features_tested.Routes/Gigs - Assign Driver: PASS - Assigned driver to gig, all orders updated to 'assigned' status
features_tested.Routes/Gigs - Status Sync Bug Fix: PASS - Orders assigned via Gig show 'assigned' status in Order Management page
features_tested.Routes/Gigs - Split Gig: PASS - Split order 2 from gig 8 to new gig 9. Order status reset to 'new'.
features_tested.Routes/Gigs - Optimize Route: PASS - Circuit API configured, optimization marks gig as 'optimized'
